This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Chinetsu Karte: The Devilish Cherry**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/224190-3SEFMBB.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Chinetsu Karte: The Devilish Cherry  
**Japanese Title:** 恥熱カルテ The Devilish Cherry  
**Label:** Suzuki Mirano  
**Number of Episodes:** 2  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
A young man who seduces the very beautiful nurse assigned to his room while he's in the hospital. He soon has her coming back again and again until she becomes his sex slave. In time, he makes a move on other nurses and even on one of the female doctors in the hospital until they, too, come under his spell.

「FLASHアニメーション miku-mania」  
  
ご主人様のために、ヘンタイたちに身を差し出したボーカ○イドの陵辱記録。  
「本当に…私がちゃんと社長さんの言うとおりにすれば……」  
  
■ストーリー前半  
ミクはスケベなご主人様に、ムリヤリえっちなことをさせられる毎日を送っていた。  
怪しげな薬を打たれて何回もイカされたり、オナニーをさせられたり……。  
だが、自分を買ってくれたご主人様をミクは慕い、それなりに満足した生活だった。  
  
■ストーリー後半  
ある日、ご主人様がしていた借金の形に、怪しげな社長のもとに連れてこられる。  
ご主人様のために、ミクは震えながら社長の言うとおりに身体を差し出す。  
  
そこから陵辱と快楽の調教が始まる……。  
  
媚薬注入、アナル開発、道具責め、絶頂寸止め、イキ顔撮影……。  
様々なコスチュームでヘンタイたちに身も心も犯される。  
そして、快感を求めるだけのSEX人形へと堕ちていく……。  
  
■描き下ろし! お触りフェラゲーム収録  
・クリックする箇所で滑らかアニメが変化!  
・言葉責めしながら、ミクが抜いてくれます  
・フィニッシュも複数用意!  
  
◆基本CG17枚+アニメ差分・カットイン差分300枚以上。  
全編迫力のアニメーション+女性キャラのみフルボイスのハード陵辱FLASH作品!

description:
[![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146807-A755GJ7.jpg)](http://erobeat.hafio.net/home)  
  
This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Tower of Etruria**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/243370-AYFIX88.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Tower of Etruria  
**Japanese Title:** タワー オブ エトルリア  
**Label:** Milky  
**Number of Episodes:** 2  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
Princess Cecelia was kidnapped by a witch, Etruria, and she was confined into the tower. The king proposed that if someone would save her from the witch he would let her marry him. A knight named Albion accepted the proposition. Whether would Albion beat the monsters living in the tower to get the top of the tower where the princess was confined? What would become of Princess Cecelia and Knight Albion?
